news.title: MERCOR AFTER Q3 2024/2025

news.title: Ireland's Kingspan To Invest Over EUR 200M In A Manufacturing Campus In Western Ukraine

news.title: Network International Partners With Blu Penguin to Provide Mobile Money Payments in Ghana
news.summary: The Blu Penguin Company Limited integrates with Network.
news.article: Through this collaboration, Blu Penguin will integrate its technology with Network International's acquiring infrastructure, ensuring a secure and efficient backend for processing mobile money transactions across major telecom networks.

news.title: Mastercard And MoMo Uganda Launch Virtual Card
news.summary: MTN Uganda partners with Network.
news.article: MTN Mobile Money Uganda has unveiled its new Virtual Card by MoMo through a partnership with Mastercard, Diamond Trust Bank, and Network International.

news.title: Network International Begins Rolling Out Digital Payment Solutions Across Airtel Markets
news.summary: Network partners with Airtel Money Kenya Limited.
news.article: Network International in partnership with Airtel Money, has begun rolling out digital payment solutions across African markets where Airtel operates, starting with Uganda - with more activations scheduled for the rest of Africa and Francophone countries later this year.

news.title: Network and flydubai Enhance Travel Payments in Kenya and Uganda
news.summary: Network expands offices to Tanzania, Eastern Africa, Africa.
news.article: With the integration of mobile money, Network and flydubai are helping reshape airline payments and enhance travellers' experience - starting with Kenya and Uganda and soon expanding to Tanzania and other African markets.

news.title: Network International Appoints Aron Kamakil As CIO For Eastern Africa
news.summary: Network hires Aron Kamakil as Chief Information Officer.
news.article: Network International appointed Aron Kamakil as the Chief Information Officer (CIO) for Eastern Africa.

news.title: RAKBANK sells business line to global entity Network.
news.summary: Rakbank sells assets to Network in the amount of $167M.
news.article: RAKBANK sold its merchant acquiring business line to Network for a total consideration of AED 551 million.
